title: The Golden Sovereign: Regal Halo of Power
fullPrompt: Hyper-realistic, cinematic head-and-shoulders portrait of a regal dark-skinned bald man with a short beard, centered composition, intense stoic expression and piercing amber-golden eyes; ornate gold filigree tattoo/markings across the forehead, deep healed scars along the cheeks, textured skin pores and subtle sweat, dramatic warm rim and key lighting creating rich chiaroscuro. He wears a white ceremonial robe with gold trim over a black inner garment, layered thick braided gold chains and diamond pendants. Glowing geometric golden halo behind his head, shallow depth of field, flawless skin detail, ultra high resolution, 85mm portrait lens look, studio lighting, moody warm color palette, photoreal, cinematic, editorial-quality, intricate jewelry reflections, volumetric light, award-winning portrait aesthetic.
